items.title: Long Easy Run
items.description: Run 10 km at a pace of 6:30 min/km. Maintain a heart rate in Zone 2 (130-145 bpm). Focus on steady breathing and relaxed form.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: 8 minutes warm-up, followed by 5x800m intervals at 5:10 min/km pace with 2 minutes recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes. Aim for a heart rate of 85-90% max during intervals.

items.title: Weight Training Session
items.description: Focus on lower body strength: 3 sets of 10 squats, 3 sets of 10 lunges (each leg), and 3 sets of 12 deadlifts. Rest 60 seconds between sets. Aim for moderate weights that challenge you but allow for good form.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at an easy pace of 7:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate in Zone 1 (below 130 bpm) to facilitate recovery.
